findings.title: Replace shell=True in BashMock release test helper
findings.body: Static analysis flags tests/unit_tests/fixtures/bash_mock.py for invoking a constructed shell command with shell=True. The helper can pass argv directly to subprocess.run and preserve dry-run behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Pass tag_latest_release.sh arguments as an argv list.
Keep TEST_ENV behavior and existing return semantics.

findings.title: Remove deprecated datetime.utcnow from report scheduling hot paths
findings.body: Superset declares Python 3.12 support. datetime.utcnow() is deprecated and report scheduling has many direct call sites. Remediate the report execution/pruning hot path with a UTC clock helper while preserving naive UTC values where existing SQLAlchemy models expect them.
acceptance_criteria: Replace direct datetime.utcnow calls in the scoped report command files.
Preserve naive UTC values where existing SQLAlchemy models expect them.
Add or update focused tests for the clock helper behavior.

findings.title: Implement q filtering for ExtensionsRestApi.get_list
findings.body: ExtensionsRestApi.get_list has a TODO for supporting the FAB q parameter but currently returns every extension. Implement a minimal, documented filter path and tests so clients can query by publisher/name without client-side scanning.
acceptance_criteria: Parse q safely using Superset/FAB conventions already used by APIs.
Support filtering by extension publisher and name.
Add unit tests covering unfiltered, filtered, and invalid q behavior.
